response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js work shows systems-level ability, but the absence of proven C++ in commercial routing systems and limited evidence of OS/distributed systems expertise for routing tiling raises significant gaps.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via open-source GISCollective platform
Strong systems-level programming background with DLang and low-latency apps
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation systems
Lack of explicit experience with routing tile generation or map data pipelines
Minimal evidence of fault tolerance, consistency, or distributed systems in production routing contexts
